raw: {"perspective": "Risk Manager", "findings": [{"severity": "CRITICAL", "file_or_area": "packages/swarm/archive/code_index.py", "issue": "code-index.json is empty due to builder being moved to archive/ and not running; critical path for agent context intelligence is broken", "recommended_fix": "Restore code_index.py to active modules, fix glob path resolution by aligning cwd with project_root, and add CI check that index has >100 files"}, {"severity": "HIGH", "file_or_area": "code-index.json", "issue": "Empty index causes all agents to operate blind, increasing solo-execution (Class 3) and false-completion (Class 7) risks", "recommended_fix": "Add pre-execution guard: halt if code-index.json has <100 entries or built_at is stale (>1h)"}], "overall_verdict": "fail", "whistleblower_flag": "code-index failure undermines swarm cognition — active risk to Constitution adherence", "next_files_to_read": ["packages/swarm/arch/config.ts"]}

findings.issue: code-index.json is empty due to builder being moved to archive/ and not running; critical path for agent context intelligence is broken
findings.recommended_fix: Restore code_index.py to active modules, fix glob path resolution by aligning cwd with project_root, and add CI check that index has >100 files

findings.issue: Empty index causes all agents to operate blind, increasing solo-execution (Class 3) and false-completion (Class 7) risks
findings.recommended_fix: Add pre-execution guard: halt if code-index.json has <100 entries or built_at is stale (>1h)

whistleblower_flag: code-index failure undermines swarm cognition — active risk to Constitution adherence
